creator: chris@ctgameinfo.com
text:
portupgrade exists as 2 different ports with different versions

sysutils/portupgrade
    Date created:         18 March 2001
    PORTVERSION=    2.1.3.3

ports-mgmt/portupgrade
    Date created:         18 March 2001
    PORTVERSION=    2.4.3

Fix: 

One should probably be deleted.
